title: U.S. Indictment of Sinaloa’s Governor Is a Reckoning for Residents of the Mexican State
summary_full: The U.S. indictment of a Mexican governor confirms what many residents say they had long suspected: The line between organized crime and the upper echelons of government has blurred.
summary_public: The U.S. indictment of a Mexican governor confirms what many residents say they had long suspected: The line between organized crime and the upper echelons of government has blurred.
